id.description: Slug, unique across the collection. Matches the filename minus extension.

source.description: Short human-readable attribution, if adapted from somewhere.

provenance.description: Structured capture record for recipes brought in through the ingestion pipeline (docs/ingestion.md). Omitted for hand-written recipes.

creator.description: Person/account/publication credited, e.g. '@handle' or 'Grandma's recipe card'.

captured_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD the raw material was captured, not when the recipe was authored.

raw_capture_path.description: Path under inbox/ where the original raw capture is kept for audit.

transcribed.description: True if any part of this recipe came from audio/video transcription rather than written text.

extraction_notes.description: What was ambiguous, missing, or inferred during normalization. Empty string if extraction was unambiguous.

mode.description: Which CJ-A9U preset this recipe targets, if any. 'manual' means stovetop/no machine mode intended.

id.description: Referenced by phases[].add_ingredients to mark when this goes in.

phases.description: Ordered cooking steps. Every phase must have a human instruction; machine fields are optional and filled in as CJ-A9U reverse engineering progresses.

instruction.description: Plain-language instruction, sufficient to cook this phase by hand with no machine.

add_ingredients.description: Ingredient ids (from ingredients[].id) added at the start of this phase.

duration_sec.description: Expected duration of this phase, if timed.

heat_level.description: Machine heat setting for this phase, once known (e.g. a named level or measured temp_c). Null/omitted until confirmed.

temp_c.description: Target temperature in Celsius, once measured/confirmed on hardware.

stir_speed.description: Machine stir speed for this phase, once known.
